calendar.matters:
Petition For Order That Asset Constitutes Trust Asset
Off Calendar May-17-2016 Advanced From May-17-16 To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order That Asset Constitutes Trust Asset
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Pollak for (petitioners) Michael & Michele Battaini.

The Court stated that this is a petition to determine if real property belongs in the trust, that the trust is specific to schedule A, that the property is not on the schedule, that the will shows the property passing through the will and being probated and that there is no general assignment or documentation. Mr. Pollak cited 2.21, that the trustee of community property is to transfer the property and that Ukkestad can be used to transfer, that the will says that the personal residence is to be placed in the survivors trust, cited 6300, and that the pour over will transfers all of her assets. The Court stated that it does not put it into the trust and that probate will put it into the trust. Mr. Pollak stated that all of the beneficiaries approve and that there is a pending sale. The Court stated that they can get special letters to handle it. Mr. Pollak stated that Ukkestad sanctions this court to order it. The Court stated that it does not think it is sufficient and that there is contradictory evidence. The Court denied the petition for order that asset constitutes trust asset.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time
Off Calendar Apr-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
